name: Lifting Equipment QR Code Stickers
shortDescription: Durable weatherproof QR code sticker labels for lifting gear — scan any asset instantly to pull up its register, inspection history, and next due date.

children.text: These heavy-duty QR code sticker labels are designed specifically for lifting equipment in harsh industrial environments. Made from UV-resistant, waterproof vinyl with a permanent adhesive that bonds to metal, synthetic slings, and hard-hat plastics.

Each pack contains 50 pre-numbered QR code labels (38mm × 38mm). Once applied to an asset and linked in Regatta Registers, anyone on your team can scan the code with any smartphone to instantly view the asset's full compliance record — no app download required.

Material: UV-resistant vinyl. Size: 38mm × 38mm. Pack: 50 labels. Adhesive: Permanent, rated to -40°C to +120°C. Finish: Gloss laminate, scratch-resistant. Compatible with all Regatta Registers accounts.

name: Asset Identification Tags — Stainless Steel
shortDescription: Engraved stainless steel asset tags with QR code and unique serial number — built to survive heavy-duty site conditions where stickers won't last.

children.text: When stickers won't cut it, these 1.2mm 316-grade stainless steel asset tags are the answer. Laser-engraved with a unique serial number and QR code that link directly to the asset record in Regatta Registers. Designed for equipment that sees extreme conditions — grinding sparks, chemical wash-downs, and UV exposure.

Pack of 20 stainless steel tags (50mm × 25mm), each with a pre-drilled 4mm mounting hole and a split-ring attachment. Tags come pre-numbered and are linked to your Regatta Registers account upon delivery — ready to attach and scan from day one.

Material: 316 stainless steel, 1.2mm. Size: 50mm × 25mm. Pack: 20 tags + split rings. Mounting: 4mm pre-drilled hole. Engraving: Laser-etched, permanent. Temperature range: -60°C to +300°C. Compatible with all Regatta Registers accounts.
